descriptionPlain: Northwind is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build distributed Python services on Kubernetes. Stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, pgvector. Bonus points for LangGraph or agent orchestration experience.
additionalPlain: We offer competitive compensation, equity, and remote-friendly culture.

descriptionPlain: Lead reliability engineering at Northwind. Own SLOs, on-call, and observability tooling (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana). Strong Python and distributed-systems background required.
Enterprise sales role. Channel partnerships, quota carrying, SaaS background required.
